ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the model (e.g., CNN, LSTM, GRU) */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the model belongs to */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., supervised, unsupervised) */,
  "number_of_layers" INTEGER /* Number of layers in the model */,
  "number_of_parameters" INTEGER /* Number of parameters in the model */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate of the model */,
  "optimizer" TEXT /* Optimizer used by the model */,
  "loss_function" TEXT /* Loss function used by the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the metric belongs to */,
  "batchsize" INTEGER /* Batch size of the model */,
  "matsize" INTEGER /* Matrix size of the model */,
  "channels_in" INTEGER /* Number of input channels of the model */,
  "poolsize" INTEGER /* Pooling size of the model */,
  "padding" INTEGER /* Padding of the model */,
  "strides" INTEGER /* Strides of the model */,
  "time_max" REAL /* Maximum time taken by the model */,
  "time_min" REAL /* Minimum time taken by the model */,
  "time_median" REAL /* Median time taken by the model */,
  "time_mean" REAL /* Mean time taken by the model */,
  "time_trim_mean" REAL /* Trimmed mean time taken by the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the metric */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_models" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the relationship */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_permissions" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Permission level of the user for the model (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the permission */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_permissions" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Permission level of the user for the experiment (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the permission */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "user_id")
)
